channel.title: Posts on A minimal Hugo website
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on A minimal Hugo website

item.title: CreatePostProcess
item.description: 使用命令或者窗口新建文章 hugo new posts/createPostProcess.md 新建的文章默认根目录content目录 2. 使用编辑器打开创建的文章并编辑 这里使用的编辑器是VSCODE 3.

item.title: WordPronuciation
item.description: he的弱读 there he is = [there rui iz] who is he [hu aizi] did he = [di di] but if he = [bu di fi] but he = [bu di] what he = [wha di] food is he = [foo di zi] does he = [de zi] believe he = [believ di] is he = [i zi] what's he = [whʌ tsi] what'd he = [whʌ di] guess he = [ge si] because he = [bi cuzi] who's he = [hu zi] him的弱读 told him = [tol dɜm] aboudt hime = [abou dɜm] leave him alone = [li vɜ ma long] got him = [gʌ dɜm] give him up = [gi vɜ map] let him in = [lɜ dɜ min] want him = [wan nɜm] met him = [me dɜm] killed him = [kill dɜm] put him = [pu dɜm] them的弱读 get them = [ge dɜm] took them off = [too kɜ moff] put them all = [pu dɜ mɔl] had them = [hæ dɜm] rub them all = [rʌ bɜ mɔl] take them = [ta kɜm] put them up = [pu dɜ mʌp] rack them up = [ra kɜ mʌp] one of them = [wʌ nɜ vɜm] look at them = [loo kɜ dɜm] ate them all = [a tɜ mɔl] want them = [wan nɜm] love them = [lʌ vɜm] her的弱读 send her in = [sen dər rin] tell her = [tɜ lər] with her = [wi thər] told her = [tol dər] get her = [ge dər] call her = [call dər] like her = [li kər] let her = [lɜ dər] dangle gave her a = .
